contenuto: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 800" width="100%" height="100%"><rect width="800" height="800" fill="#0b0c10"/><rect x="50" y="380" width="700" height="40" fill="#e63946" opacity="0.8"/><rect x="50" y="420" width="700" height="20" fill="#ffb703" opacity="0.8"/><rect x="50" y="440" width="700" height="60" fill="#219ebc" opacity="0.6"/><polygon points="250,200 550,200 600,550 200,550" fill="#1a1a24" stroke="#f8f9fa" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.9"/><path d="M 380 300 C 420 320, 430 380, 390 410 C 350 430, 310 380, 330 330 Z" fill="#3a3a40" opacity="0.8"/><path d="M 400 310 C 440 330, 450 390, 410 420" fill="none" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.9"/><path d="M 420 330 C 460 350, 470 410, 430 440" fill="none" stroke="#f8f9fa" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M 440 350 C 480 370, 490 430, 450 460" fill="none" stroke="#ffb703" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.8"/><line x1="200" y1="200" x2="600" y2="550" stroke="#f8f9fa" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,4" opacity="0.4"/><line x1="550" y1="200" x2="200" y2="550" stroke="#f8f9fa" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,4" opacity="0.4"/><text x="70" y="100" fill="#f8f9fa" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" letter-spacing="3" opacity="0.8">LA PRESSIONE SULLA MATERIA // BERNINI & MALEVIC</text></svg>
